## FacetsService.toggle() method

Selects a deselected filter, and deselects a selected filter, adding them to the store in both cases.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
toggle(filter: Filter): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  filter | Filter | The filter to toggle. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
